summary: First iteration full E2E for CRESARA. Backend 22/22 pytest passing (health, auth login/me/logout, courses list/filter/get/CRUD with auth, 401s for unauth POST/PUT/DELETE, 422 for invalid category, 404 for unknown id). Frontend verified: Home hero CTA navigates to /cursos, 9 course cards rendered, category chips filter to 3/3/3, course detail shows iframe + Acceder + Comprar buttons, Nosotros loads with mission text, /admin/login shows error toast on bad creds and redirects to /admin/dashboard on success. Dashboard shows 9 rows; create dialog adds course (10 rows), search filter narrows to 1, delete shows 'Curso eliminado' toast and returns to 9; logout returns to /admin/login. Cookie httpOnly + Secure attributes verified in Set-Cookie header.

issues: Initial console shows 401 for /api/auth/me on public pages — this is harmless (AuthContext bootstrap) but could be silenced by suppressing the error log or by checking a flag before calling /me

action_items: (Optional) Suppress console 401 noise from /api/auth/me bootstrap on public routes (set a 'tried-auth' flag or swallow 401 silently in AuthContext refresh).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager in a future iteration.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env — fine for dev seed but flag for production.
CORS uses allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True via the '*' shortcut path; works because allow_origin_regex is set, but explicit origin allow-list is safer for production.
AdminDashboard.jsx is 491 lines — split into CourseTable, CourseDialog, ConfirmDeleteDialog for maintainability (>300 lines guideline).
Course detail uses YouTube embed conversion — verified iframe renders. Good.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed created. Test created TEST_E2E_Curso_UI via UI and TEST_Curso E2E via API; both deleted in same test run. Backend seed (9 courses + admin) verified intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL is REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://clarity-decidir.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth uses httpOnly cookie (samesite=none, secure=true). Pytest file is /app/backend/tests/test_cresara_api.py — re-run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env. Categories literal: mujeres|hombres|relaciones (invalid -> 422). 9 courses are seeded automatically on backend startup if collection empty.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in this iteration.
